title: Clown Pierce Texture Pack
description: Little ClownPierce Texture Pack I made.
body:
This is a self-made **ClownPierce-themed texture pack**.  
It changes several elements such as **armor, swords, and sounds**, and is designed especially for **PvP**, particularly **Lifesteal/SMP PvP**.

If you encounter any bugs or have suggestions, feel free to DM me on Discord: **cisco1244**

Currently not going to update it that regularely, due to me working on a mod based on this texture pack

---

## ⚙️ Requirements
- **[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** — recommended for **1.17 - 1.21**  
- **[Variants CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)** — recommended for **1.21 and newer**  
- **[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)** — optional (please only use standalone, when you want to go deeper than 1.8.9
> ⚠️**Note:** Optifine is **not recommended**.  
> For better FPS, use [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) instead.

---

## 💬 Notes
I hope you enjoy the texture pack and have fun using it!  

**Important:** even if I havent yet updated the texture pack to the newest version, it will work on any version CIT Resewn/CIT Variant/Optifine works on!

**Edit:** Thank you all so much for the downloads ❤️  

**Tip:** Try these music discs:
- 🎵 **Cat** → *Sans Last Breath - Phase 3*  
- 🎵 **9** → *Aria Math*  

---

# 📦 Installation
## 🧩 Option 1:
### Installation - CIT Resewn
1. Download the mod from the link above (and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/project/P7dR8mSH))
2. Go to:
- **Windows:** `%appdata%\.minecraft\mods`
- **Linux:** `~\.minecraft\mods`
- **MacOS:** `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/mods`
3. Open Minecraft
### Installation - Texture Pack
1. Download CIT Resewn (Guide Above)
2. Open:
- **Windows:** `%appdata%\.minecraft\resourcepacks`
- **Linux:** `~\.minecraft\resourcepacks`
- **MacOS:** `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/resourcepacks`
3. Place the `.zip` file inside the `resourcepacks/` folder.

## 🎨 Option 2:
Open Minecraft with CIT Resewn added and put the texturepack `.zip` in the texture pack settings
